LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-24-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order signed. Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
